questions.q: As of April 9, 2026, how many days has the Russian invasion of Ukraine been ongoing, according to the /r/WorldNews live thread?
According to the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN), what is the primary threat leading to the risk of extinction for Emperor Penguins?
options: Mass drowning of chicks due to melting sea ice
questions.correctText: Mass drowning of chicks due to melting sea ice.
